source_pr.title: expression: change the String() method of `expression.Column`
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Not rely on `*Name`s.
To remove `*Name`s from `expression.Column`.

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

symptoms: result: "TableReader(Table(t))->Sort->Window(avg(cast(Column#1)) over(order by Column#1 asc, Column#2 desc range between unbounded preceding and current row))->Projection", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR refactors `expression.Column.String()` and updates many golden outputs; no concrete intermittent flaky signature is provided in the case data.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes how `expression.Column` is stringified (removing reliance on `*Name`s) and updates a large set of golden/EXPLAIN outputs accordingly. The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted flaky-test stabilization change, so keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: result: "TableReader(Table(t))->Sort->Window(avg(cast(Column#1)) over(order by Column#1 asc, Column#2 desc range between unbounded preceding and current row))->Projection", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
